name: Egyptian Electric Cooperative Association
territory: Saline, Gallatin, White, Hamilton, and Hardin counties, southern Illinois

netMetering.policy: Net metering at retail rate for systems ≤ 40 kW
netMetering.notes: Illinois Net Metering Act (220 ILCS 5/16-107.5) applies; southern IL territory

interconnection.applicationFeeNotes: Standard residential fee; engineering study required for systems > 10 kW

incentives.notes: Illinois Shines (ABP) available; rural southern IL — USDA REAP grants applicable
